body.hr:
Ring gauge (RG) = 64-ine inča promjera. Duljina se često navodi u inčima (1″ ≈ 25,4 mm). Smoke time je orijentir za umjeren ritam — tko vuče brzo, skraćuje ga.

PAREJO (ravan kraj / ravna glava)
• Petit / Mini / Puritos — ~4″ × 28–32 RG (~15–25 min). Brza pauza; okus koncentriran, lako pregori ako žuriš.
• Petit Corona / Mareva / Half Corona — ~4–4½″ × 40–42 RG (~25–40 min). Mala klasika; pun okus bez dugog sjedenja.
• Corona — ~5½″ × 42 RG (~40–55 min). Referentni omjer wrappera i punila; hladniji dim, jasan razvoj.
• Corona Gorda / Gran Corona — ~5½–6″ × 46–48 RG (~50–65 min). Više dima uz eleganciju corone.
• Petit Robusto / Rothschild — ~3½–4½″ × 48–52 RG (~30–45 min). Odmah u srž; idealan kad je vrijeme kratko.
• Robusto — ~4¾–5″ × 50 RG (~45–60 min). Najčešći moderni format; pun okus, još uvijek upravljiv.
• Robusto Grande / Double Robusto — ~5½″ × 50–54 RG (~55–70 min). Ista koncentracija, malo više vremena.
• Toro / Cañonazo — ~6″ × 50–54 RG (~60–75 min). Moderni standard; uravnotežen omjer i sat razvoja.
• Toro Grande / Gran Toro — ~6–6½″ × 54–56 RG (~75–90 min). Više mekog, hladnog dima.
• Churchill / Julieta — ~7″ × 47–50 RG (~75–90 min). Svečan, hladniji dim, postupni luk okusa.
• Double Corona / Prominente — ~7½–8″ × 49–52 RG (~90–120 min). Maksimalna kompleksnost i hladnoća.
• Gordo / Magnum (~58–60+ RG) — ~6″ × 58–60 (~70–90 min). Obilje mekog dima; punilo vodi, wrapper manje dominira.
• Lancero / Laguito №1 — ~7–7½″ × 38–40 RG (~60–75 min). Wrapper dominira; traži spor ritam i dobar draw.
• Panatela — ~6–7″ × 34–38 RG (~45–60 min). Elegantna, tanka; lako pregori na vjetru.

FIGURADO (sužena glava ili oba kraja)
• Belicoso — ~5–5½″ × 50–52, kratko suženje (~50–65 min). Fokusiran vučni kanal; rez jako utječe na potez.
• Torpedo / Pirámide — ~6–7″ × 52–54, duže suženje (~70–90 min). Dim se koncentrira na jeziku; biraj rez pažljivo.
• Perfecto — sužen na oba kraja (~45–90 min ovisno o veličini). Počinje usko, zatim se otvara — stara škola.
• Diadema / Salomon — veliki dvostruko šiljasti (~90–120+ min). Za dugu večer; okus u valovima.
• Culebra — tri prepletene panatele. Kuriozitet za dijeljenje, ne za solo fokus.

Karakteristike pri pušenju
• Uži RG → više udjela wrappera, brže hlađenje, oštrije nijanse; greške u ritmu se više osjete.
• Širi RG → više punila, mekši/hladniji dim, sporije otvaranje; lakše „proguta“ brži tempo.
• Duljina daje vremena za luk okusa (prva / srednja / zadnja trećina).
• Figurado: glava usmjerava dim — prevelik rez gubi fokus, premali guši vuču.
body.en:
Ring gauge (RG) = 64ths of an inch across. Length is often in inches (1″ ≈ 25.4 mm). Smoke time assumes a moderate pace — a fast draw shortens it.

PAREJO (straight sides / flat head)
• Petit / Mini / Puritos — ~4″ × 28–32 RG (~15–25 min). Quick break; concentrated flavour, easy to overheat if rushed.
• Petit Corona / Mareva / Half Corona — ~4–4½″ × 40–42 RG (~25–40 min). Small classic; full flavour without a long sit.
• Corona — ~5½″ × 42 RG (~40–55 min). Benchmark wrapper-to-filler ratio; cooler smoke, clear evolution.
• Corona Gorda / Gran Corona — ~5½–6″ × 46–48 RG (~50–65 min). More smoke while keeping corona elegance.
• Petit Robusto / Rothschild — ~3½–4½″ × 48–52 RG (~30–45 min). Straight to the core; ideal when time is short.
• Robusto — ~4¾–5″ × 50 RG (~45–60 min). Today's most common format; full flavour, still manageable.
• Robusto Grande / Double Robusto — ~5½″ × 50–54 RG (~55–70 min). Same concentration, a little more time.
• Toro / Cañonazo — ~6″ × 50–54 RG (~60–75 min). Modern standard; balanced ratio and an hour of development.
• Toro Grande / Gran Toro — ~6–6½″ × 54–56 RG (~75–90 min). More soft, cool smoke.
• Churchill / Julieta — ~7″ × 47–50 RG (~75–90 min). Stately, cooler smoke, gradual flavour arc.
• Double Corona / Prominente — ~7½–8″ × 49–52 RG (~90–120 min). Maximum complexity and coolness.
• Gordo / Magnum (~58–60+ RG) — ~6″ × 58–60 (~70–90 min). Masses of soft smoke; filler leads, wrapper less dominant.
• Lancero / Laguito No. 1 — ~7–7½″ × 38–40 RG (~60–75 min). Wrapper-led; needs a slow pace and a good draw.
• Panatela — ~6–7″ × 34–38 RG (~45–60 min). Elegant and slim; burns fast in wind.

FIGURADO (tapered head or both ends)
• Belicoso — ~5–5½″ × 50–52, short taper (~50–65 min). Focused draw; the cut strongly shapes the pull.
• Torpedo / Pirámide — ~6–7″ × 52–54, longer taper (~70–90 min). Smoke concentrates on the tongue; cut carefully.
• Perfecto — tapered at both ends (~45–90 min by size). Starts tight, then opens — old-school.
• Diadema / Salomon — large double-taper (~90–120+ min). Long evening; flavour in waves.
• Culebra — three braided panetelas. A shareable curiosity, not a solo focus smoke.

Smoking traits
• Narrower RG → more wrapper share, faster cooling, sharper nuance; pacing mistakes show more.
• Wider RG → more filler, softer/cooler smoke, slower unfold; forgives a quicker pace.
• Length buys time for a flavour arc (first / middle / final third).
• Figurado: the head channels smoke — too large a cut loses focus, too small chokes the draw.

body.hr:
Snaga = nikotin (koliko „udara“ u glavu/prsa). Tijelo = gustoća dima i punoća okusa. Mogu ići odvojeno: puna maduro može biti srednje jaka; blaga Connecticut može biti srednjeg tijela.

Ljestvica (orijentir u appu)
• 1–2 snaga — blago; jutro, espresso, prvi cigar dana.
• 3 — srednje; većina premium večeri.
• 4–5 — jako; nakon jela, sporije vučenje, voda pri ruci.

Tijelo
• 1–2 — lagan, proziran dim; fino sherry, VS/VSOP, lagani rum.
• 3 — srednje; VSOP/XO, speyside, solera.
• 4–5 — gust; XO, armagnac, Jerez, peated whisky.

Pri pušenju
• Visoka snaga + brz ritam → vrtoglavica; uspori, ne „dokazuj“.
• Visoko tijelo + suho piće → tanini/dim mogu zategnuti; biraj slaganje.
• Zadnja trećina često jača — planiraj piće koje to podnese ili skraćuješ dim.

Pairing
• Match tijelo ↔ tijelo pića. Snagu biraj prema svom ritmu, ne prema egou etikete.
body.en:
Strength = nicotine (how hard it hits head/chest). Body = smoke density and flavour fullness. They can diverge: a full maduro can be medium-strong; a mild Connecticut can be medium-bodied.

Scale (app guide)
• Strength 1–2 — mild; morning, espresso, first cigar of the day.
• 3 — medium; most premium evenings.
• 4–5 — strong; after a meal, slower draws, water nearby.

Body
• 1–2 — light, airy smoke; fino sherry, VS/VSOP, light rum.
• 3 — medium; VSOP/XO, Speyside, solera.
• 4–5 — dense; XO, armagnac, Jerez, peated whisky.

While smoking
• High strength + fast pace → light-headedness; slow down, do not 'prove' anything.
• High body + dry drink → tannins/smoke can tighten; choose the match.
• The final third often strengthens — plan a drink that can carry it, or shorten the smoke.

Pairing
• Match body ↔ drink body. Pick strength for your pace, not the ego of the label.

body.hr:
Omotač (capa) daje velik dio mirisa i prvog doživljaja. Boja često prati fermentaciju i sunce, ne samo sortu.

Glavni tipovi
• Candela (doble claro) — zelenkasto-svijetla; kratka fermentacija. Travnato, površno slatko; rijetka danas.
• Connecticut Shade — uzgoj pod mrežom; svijetla, tanka. Krem, maslac, blagi orah; blaga snaga, srednje-lagano tijelo.
• Cameroon — tanka, uljasta, često „zupčasta“ tekstura. Začin, zemlja, kakao; srednje.
• Sumatra / Ecuador Sumatra — tamniji od Shade, začinsko-slatkasta. Dobar „most“ između Connecticut i Habano.
• Habano (često Ecuador/Nicaragua Habano) — uljasta, smeđa. Papar, cedar, zemlja; srednje do punije tijelo.
• Criollo — starija linija; zemljano, orašasto, ponekad kakao. Srednje.
• Corojo — začinski, često oštriji papar na početku; srednje-jako.
• Connecticut Broadleaf — debela, tamna kad je maduro; zemlja, tamna čokolada; punije tijelo.
• Mexican San Andrés — često kao maduro omotač; zemlja, tamna slatkoća, sol; nosi jake blendove.
• Maduro — nije sorta nego dulja/toplija fermentacija; tamno smeđa. Kakao, kava, suho voće; tijelo raste.
• Oscuro / Double Maduro — najtamniji kraj; još više fermentacije. Gust, slatkast-gorak, sporije gori.
• Habano Rosado / Colorado — crvenkasto-smeđa; voćno-začinska sredina spektra.

Što osjetiš pri pušenju
• Svjetli wrapper → brže se čitaju nijanse, manje „pokriva“ punilo.
• Tamni/maduro → više ulja, sporije gorenje, slađi/zemljani profil, više tijela.
• Tanki wrapper (Cameroon, Shade) lako se cijepa pri lošem rezu — oštar rezač.

Puro = capa + capote + tripa iz iste zemlje. Kubanske cigare su uvijek puros; New World često miješa zemlje namjerno.
body.en:
The wrapper (capa) drives much of the nose and first impression. Colour often follows fermentation and sun, not variety alone.

Main types
• Candela (doble claro) — greenish-pale; short fermentation. Grassy, lightly sweet; rare today.
• Connecticut Shade — grown under cloth; pale, thin. Cream, butter, mild nut; mild strength, light–medium body.
• Cameroon — thin, oily, often 'toothy'. Spice, earth, cocoa; medium.
• Sumatra / Ecuador Sumatra — darker than Shade, spicy-sweet. A bridge between Connecticut and Habano.
• Habano (often Ecuador/Nicaragua Habano) — oily brown. Pepper, cedar, earth; medium to fuller body.
• Criollo — older lineage; earthy, nutty, sometimes cocoa. Medium.
• Corojo — spicy, often sharper pepper up front; medium–strong.
• Connecticut Broadleaf — thick, dark when maduro; earth, dark chocolate; fuller body.
• Mexican San Andrés — often a maduro wrapper; earth, dark sweetness, salt; carries bold blends.
• Maduro — not a variety but longer/hotter fermentation; dark brown. Cocoa, coffee, dried fruit; body rises.
• Oscuro / Double Maduro — darkest end; still more fermentation. Dense, bittersweet, slower burn.
• Habano Rosado / Colorado — reddish-brown; fruity-spicy mid-spectrum.

While smoking
• Lighter wrappers → nuances read faster; less 'cover' over the filler.
• Dark/maduro → more oils, slower burn, sweeter/earthier profile, more body.
• Thin wrappers (Cameroon, Shade) tear easily with a bad cut — keep the cutter sharp.

A puro = wrapper + binder + filler from one country. Cubans are always puros; New World often blends countries on purpose.

body.hr:
Cilj: 65–72 % relativne vlage (RH), oko 18–21 °C. Mnogi biraju ~65–68 % za čišće gorenje; 70–72 % za mekši draw i dulje čuvanje.

Komponente
• Kutija / kabinet s cedarom (španjolski cedar ili cedar ploče).
• Digihigrometar (kalibriraj Boveda 75 % kitom ili solnim testom).
• Izvor vlage: Boveda (58/62/65/69/72), gel, ili klasični humidifier — ne otvorena spužva bez kontrole.
• Putni humidor / jar za 5–15 cigara.

Sezona (novi humidor)
1. Obriši prašinu; ne lakiraj unutra.
2. Navlaži cedar (Boveda 84 za seasoning, ili destilirana voda na spužvi uz cedar — oprez s plijesni).
3. 3–14 dana dok RH stabilno ne sjedi.
4. Tek onda stavi cigare; prvih tjedan dana ne sudi draw.

Simptomi
• Presuho (<60 %) — vruće, brzo, gorko, omotač puca.
• Prevlažno (>75 %) — težak draw, plijesan (bijeli pahuljasti vs. benigni plume/kristali — plume je suh i nestaje).
• Nestabilna RH — prečesto otvaranje; daj mir.

Pri pušenju iz kutije
• Cigare iz trgovine odmaraj nekoliko dana.
• Ne miješaj jako mirisne (peated tipa) s nježnim Connecticut bez pregrade.
• Kabineti (stotines cigara) imaju smisla kad zaliha raste — počni s desktopom.
body.en:
Target: 65–72% relative humidity (RH), about 18–21 °C. Many prefer ~65–68% for a cleaner burn; 70–72% for a softer draw and longer storage.

Parts
• Box / cabinet with cedar (Spanish cedar or cedar trays).
• Digital hygrometer (calibrate with a Boveda 75% kit or salt test).
• Humidity source: Boveda (58/62/65/69/72), gel, or a classic humidifier — not an open sponge without control.
• Travel humidor / jar for 5–15 cigars.

Seasoning (new humidor)
1. Wipe dust; do not lacquer the interior.
2. Humidify the cedar (Boveda 84 for seasoning, or distilled water on a sponge near cedar — watch for mould).
3. 3–14 days until RH sits stable.
4. Only then add cigars; do not judge draw in the first week.

Symptoms
• Too dry (<60%) — hot, fast, bitter, wrapper cracks.
• Too wet (>75%) — tight draw, mould (fuzzy white vs benign plume/crystals — plume is dry and wipes away).
• Unstable RH — opening too often; give it calm.

Smoking from the box
• Rest shop cigars a few days.
• Do not mix strongly aromatic sticks with delicate Connecticuts without a divider.
• Cabinets (hundreds of cigars) make sense as stock grows — start with a desktop.

body.hr:
Cilj: otvoriti kapu (cap) bez kidanja omotača. Jedan čist rez > tri oklijevanja.

Vrste
• Single guillotine — jedna oštrica; jeftinija, lakše „žvače“ ako je tupa.
• Double guillotine — dvije oštrice; najčešći izbor za parejo.
• V-cut (cat's eye) — klin; usmjerava dim, dobar za belicoso/torpedo i veće RG.
• Punch / bullet — kružni otvor; manje otpada, uži kanal; loš izbor za jako sužene glave ako ide previsoko.
• Cigar scissors — kontrola na velikim figurado; sporije, preciznije.
• Sharp wedge / casino cut — rjeđe; dubok klin.

Koliko duboko
• Parejo: odreži samo kapu, ne ulazi u ram (shoulder) — vidiš šav kape.
• Torpedo/belicoso: manje je više; prevelik otvor gubi fokus figurada.
• Punch: centriraj; 7–9 mm tipično; veći RG podnosi veći punch.

Pri pušenju
• Prevelik rez → vruć, lak draw, brže gori.
• Premali → gušenje, pregrijavanje dok „boraš“.
• Tup alat → izlizan omotač, raslojavanje — nabruši ili zamijeni.

Nakon reza
• Lagano otpuhni ostatke duhana. Ne vlaži glavu sline radi „pečata“.
body.en:
Goal: open the cap without tearing the wrapper. One clean cut beats three hesitations.

Types
• Single guillotine — one blade; cheaper, more likely to chew if dull.
• Double guillotine — two blades; the usual choice for parejos.
• V-cut (cat's eye) — a wedge; channels smoke, good for belicoso/torpedo and larger RG.
• Punch / bullet — round hole; less waste, tighter channel; poor on sharply tapered heads if set too high.
• Cigar scissors — control on large figurados; slower, more precise.
• Sharp wedge / casino cut — rarer; a deep wedge.

How deep
• Parejo: cut only the cap, not into the shoulder — you should see the cap seam.
• Torpedo/belicoso: less is more; too large an opening loses the figurado focus.
• Punch: centre it; 7–9 mm typical; larger RG can take a larger punch.

While smoking
• Over-cut → hot, easy draw, faster burn.
• Under-cut → choking, overheating while you fight it.
• Dull tool → frayed wrapper, unraveling — sharpen or replace.

After the cut
• Blow off loose tobacco. Do not wet the head with saliva to 'seal' it.

body.hr:
Alati
• Soft flame butan — nježniji na omotač.
• Jet / torch butan — dobar na vjetru; drži dalje da ne ugljeniše.
• Šibice / cedar spill — bez mirisa, kontrola ruba.
• Izbjegavaj benzin/zippo fluid — miris u prvim dimovima.

Postupak
1. Toast: drži plamen ispod stopala (foot), ne diraš duhan; vrti dok rub ravnomjerno ne pocrni/užari.
2. Tek onda povuci lagano dok se žeravica ne spoji.
3. Pogledaj foot — ravna linija žara. Ako nije, dogrij sporiju stranu.

Korekcije tijekom dima
• Canoeing (jedna strana bježi) — zakreni bržu stranu dolje ili dogrij sporiju; uspori vuču.
• Tunneling (središte ispred ruba) — blago dogrij rub; provjeri RH (često prevlažno/presuho).
• Boat / uneven — isti princip: toplina na sporom rubu, miran ritam.
• Propuhivanje (puffing out) — izduvaj kroz cigar samo ako moraš očistiti pepeo/dim; ne pretjeruj.

Temperatura
• 30–60 s između povlačenja. Pepeo ne potucaj — pusti da padne. Crni vrući pepeo = prebrzo.
body.en:
Tools
• Soft-flame butane — kinder to the wrapper.
• Jet / torch butane — good in wind; keep distance so you do not charcoal the foot.
• Matches / cedar spill — odourless, rim control.
• Avoid petrol/Zippo fluid — taints the first puffs.

Method
1. Toast: hold the flame under the foot without touching leaf; rotate until the rim chars/glows evenly.
2. Only then draw gently until the coal connects.
3. Check the foot — an even ember line. If not, warm the slow side.

Corrections mid-smoke
• Canoeing (one side races) — turn the fast side down or warm the slow side; slow the draw.
• Tunneling (centre ahead of the rim) — gently warm the rim; check RH (often too wet/dry).
• Boat / uneven — same idea: heat on the slow rim, calm pace.
• Puffing out — blow through the cigar only to clear ash/smoke if needed; do not overdo it.

Temperature
• 30–60 s between draws. Do not tap ash — let it fall. Black hot ash = too fast.

body.hr:
Ritam
• Cigara nije cigareta: kratka, rijetka povlačenja.
• Cilj: stabilna temperatura, bijeli/svijetli pepeo, ujednačena linija.

Pepeo
• Čvrst, svijetli pepeo — minerali u tlu + dobra konstrukcija.
• Crn, krhak — vruće pušenje ili nestabilna RH.
• Ne treperi pepeljarom; podrži cigar kad sam padne.

Trećine (orijentir)
• Prva — upoznavanje (wrapper, prvi začin/krema).
• Srednja — srž blenda; tu pairing najviše sjaji.
• Zadnja — jače, gorče, vruće; skraćuj ili biraj piće koje nosi.

Draw dijagnostika
• Premalo zraka — mali punch/rez, prevlažna cigara, gust pack; ponekad pomaže drugi plitki rez.
• Premalo otpora — prevelik rez, presuha, rahla konstrukcija; uspori.
• Nakon kupnje odmor u humidoru često popravi „tight first day“.
body.en:
Pace
• A cigar is not a cigarette: short, infrequent draws.
• Goal: stable temperature, pale ash, even burn line.

Ash
• Firm, pale ash — soil minerals + good construction.
• Black, brittle — hot smoking or unstable RH.
• Do not tap the ashtray; support the cigar when ash falls on its own.

Thirds (guide)
• First — introduction (wrapper, first spice/cream).
• Middle — heart of the blend; where pairing shines most.
• Final — stronger, more bitter, hotter; shorten or pick a drink that can carry it.

Draw diagnostics
• Too tight — small punch/cut, over-humid cigar, dense pack; a second shallow cut sometimes helps.
• Too loose — over-cut, over-dry, loose roll; slow down.
• Rest in the humidor after buying often fixes a 'tight first day'.

body.hr:
Jednostavna mapa
• Connecticut / candela / lagano tijelo → VS–VSOP konjak, fino/manzanilla, lagani rum, champagne/cava.
• Habano / criollo / srednje → VSOP–XO, speyside, solera rum, ruby/tawny mladi.
• Maduro / oscuro / San Andrés → XO, armagnac, brandy de Jerez, tawny/PX, peated (pažljivo).

Redoslijed na večeri
1. Miris pića. 2. Gutljaj. 3. Dim. 4. Gutljaj — traži most (kakao, orah, citrus, dim).

Izbjegavaj na početku
• Jako peated + nježna Connecticut (peat pregazi).
• Mladi taninski crveni + bilo koja cigara (metalika/gorčina).
• Previše leda u brandyju uz složenu XO večer.

App
• Predlaže po pravilima (tijelo, okusi, stil). Ti zapisuješ u Kolekciji što je stvarno sjelo — nakon 20 unosa vidiš svoj obrazac.
body.en:
Simple map
• Connecticut / candela / light body → VS–VSOP cognac, fino/manzanilla, light rum, champagne/cava.
• Habano / criollo / medium → VSOP–XO, Speyside, solera rum, younger ruby/tawny.
• Maduro / oscuro / San Andrés → XO, armagnac, brandy de Jerez, tawny/PX, peated (carefully).

Evening order
1. Nose the drink. 2. Sip. 3. Smoke. 4. Sip — look for a bridge (cocoa, nut, citrus, smoke).

Avoid early on
• Heavy peat + delicate Connecticut (peat flattens it).
• Young tannic reds + any cigar (metallic/bitter clash).
• Too much ice in brandy on a serious XO evening.

App
• Suggests by rules (body, flavours, style). You log in Collection what truly worked — after 20 entries your pattern appears.

body.hr:
Čitaj etiketu u tri koraka: 1) što je (zaštićeni naziv / stil), 2) koliko je staro (VS/VSOP/XO ili godine), 3) odakle točno (cru, podregija, destilerija).

Zaštićeni brandyji (geografija + pravila)
• Cognac (Charente, FR) — uglavnom ugni blanc; dvostruka destilacija; dob VS/VSOP/XO.
• Armagnac (Gascogne) — često ugni/baco/folle blanche; kolona ili pot; više rustikalnih nota.
• Calvados (Normandija) — jabuka/kruška; Pays d'Auge = pot still + stroža pravila.
• Brandy de Jerez (Španjolska) — solera u bivšim sherry butts; stilovi Solera / Reserva / Gran Reserva.
• Pisco (Peru/Čile) — grožđe, često bez bačve ili kratko; svježiji profil.
• Vinjak / grape brandy (HR i šire) — lokalni stilovi; čitaj dob i sirovinu.

Ostalo na etiketi
• Cru na konjaku: Grande Champagne, Petite Champagne, Borderies, Fins Bois… — tlo i stil, ne dob.
• Fine Champagne = blend Grande + Petite (min. 50 % Grande).
• Vintage / millésime = berba (gdje je dozvoljeno).
• ABV % — tipično 40 %; cask strength / lotovi viši.

Pri degustaciji
• Kategorija postavlja očekivanje; dob i cru fino podešavaju pairing s cigarom.
• Isto »XO« na konjaku i armagnacu = ista logika starosti, različit destilat.
body.en:
Read the label in three steps: 1) what it is (protected name / style), 2) how old (VS/VSOP/XO or years), 3) exactly where (cru, sub-region, distillery).

Protected brandies (geography + rules)
• Cognac (Charente, FR) — mostly ugni blanc; double distillation; VS/VSOP/XO ages.
• Armagnac (Gascony) — often ugni/baco/folle blanche; column or pot; more rustic notes.
• Calvados (Normandy) — apple/pear; Pays d'Auge = pot still + stricter rules.
• Brandy de Jerez (Spain) — solera in ex-sherry butts; Solera / Reserva / Gran Reserva styles.
• Pisco (Peru/Chile) — grape, often unaged or briefly rested; fresher profile.
• Vinjak / grape brandy (HR and beyond) — local styles; read age and base.

Also on the label
• Cognac crus: Grande Champagne, Petite Champagne, Borderies, Fins Bois… — soil and style, not age.
• Fine Champagne = Grande + Petite blend (min. 50% Grande).
• Vintage / millésime = harvest year (where allowed).
• ABV % — typically 40%; cask strength / lots higher.

When tasting
• Category sets the expectation; age and cru fine-tune the cigar pairing.
• The same 'XO' on cognac and armagnac = the same age logic, a different distillate.

body.hr:
Na konjaku (i često na calvadosu/armagnacu) oznake govore o najmlađoj komponenti u blendu — sustav dozrijevanja, kao godine na scotchu.

Konjak (BNIC / EU)
• VS / ✶✶✶ — ≥ 2 godine u hrastu.
• VSOP / Réserve — ≥ 4 godine.
• Napoleon — često ≥ 6 (kućna praksa; nije uvijek isti zakon kao XO).
• XO — ≥ 10 godina (od 2018.; prije 6).
• XXO — ≥ 14 (gdje se koristi).
• Hors d'âge — iznad XO; nema jednog EU broja za sve kuće.

Armagnac
• Blanche — bez bačve / vrlo kratko.
• VS / VSOP / XO — slična logika starosti; vintage čest.

Calvados
• Fine / VS, Vieux / VSOP, XO / Hors d'âge — jabukovača s vlastitim pravilima AOC.

Brandy de Jerez
• Solera — kraće.
• Reserva — dulje.
• Gran Reserva — najduže u soleri (provjeri kuću).

Što osjetiš
• Mlađi (VS) — voće, cvijet, oštriji alkohol; uz lagane Connecticut / lunch cigare.
• VSOP — orah, vanilija, ravnoteža; široki pairing.
• XO+ — suho voće, začin, baršun; maduro, Churchill, duga večer.
• Godine ≠ kvaliteta sama; blend i bačva vode.
body.en:
On cognac (and often calvados/armagnac) marks name the youngest component in the blend — an ageing system, like years on Scotch.

Cognac (BNIC / EU)
• VS / ✶✶✶ — ≥ 2 years in oak.
• VSOP / Réserve — ≥ 4 years.
• Napoléon — often ≥ 6 (house practice; not always the same law as XO).
• XO — ≥ 10 years (since 2018; formerly 6).
• XXO — ≥ 14 (where used).
• Hors d'âge — above XO; no single EU number for every house.

Armagnac
• Blanche — unaged / very brief.
• VS / VSOP / XO — similar age logic; vintages common.

Calvados
• Fine / VS, Vieux / VSOP, XO / Hors d'âge — apple brandy under its own AOC rules.

Brandy de Jerez
• Solera — shorter.
• Reserva — longer.
• Gran Reserva — longest in solera (check the house).

What you taste
• Younger (VS) — fruit, flower, sharper alcohol; with light Connecticut / lunch cigars.
• VSOP — nut, vanilla, balance; wide pairing range.
• XO+ — dried fruit, spice, velvet; maduro, Churchill, long evening.
• Years ≠ quality alone; blend and cask lead.

body.hr:
Alat destilacije određuje koliko »karaktera sirovine« ostaje u alkoholu.

Glavni tipovi
• Pot still (Charentais / alembic) — šaržno; bogatiji kongeneri. Konjak: dva prolaza (~70 % u bačvu).
• Column / continuous — učinkovitije; čišći ili, u armagnacu, namjerno »niži« cut s više tijela (često 52–60 %).
• Hybrid — kombinacije u rumu i modernom whiskyju.

Po piću
• Cognac — dvostruki pot; svilenkast, cvjetno-voćni kad je mlad.
• Armagnac — često jedna kolona; zemlja, šljiva, začin.
• Calvados Pays d'Auge — dvostruki pot jabukovače.
• Calvados Domfrontais — više kruške, druga pravila.
• Rum pot still (Jamajka, itd.) — esters, funk; column = čišći profil.
• Scotch malt — pot; grain whisky — kolona.
• Bourbon — često kolona + doubler.

Pri degustaciji / pairing
• Više kongenera → više tijela i »hrane« za maduro / peated mostove.
• Čisti stilovi → Connecticut, fino, lagani lunch.
• ABV na ulazu u bačvu utječe na ekstrakciju hrasta — ne samo godine.
body.en:
The still decides how much of the raw material's character stays in the spirit.

Main types
• Pot still (Charentais / alembic) — batch; richer congeners. Cognac: two passes (~70% into cask).
• Column / continuous — more efficient; cleaner, or in armagnac a deliberately 'lower' cut with more body (often 52–60%).
• Hybrid — combinations in rum and modern whisky.

By drink
• Cognac — double pot; silky, floral-fruity when young.
• Armagnac — often single column; earth, plum, spice.
• Calvados Pays d'Auge — double-pot apple brandy.
• Calvados Domfrontais — more pear, different rules.
• Rum pot still (Jamaica, etc.) — esters, funk; column = cleaner profile.
• Scotch malt — pot; grain whisky — column.
• Bourbon — often column + doubler.

Tasting / pairing
• More congeners → more body and 'food' for maduro / peat bridges.
• Cleaner styles → Connecticut, fino, light lunch.
• Entry ABV into cask shapes oak extraction — not years alone.

body.hr:
Hrast daje vaniliju, tanin, začin i boju. Skladište određuje tempo.

Vrste bačava (orijentir)
• Limousin — širi godovi, više tanina; klasik za konjak.
• Tronçais / fine grain — elegancija, manje agresije.
• Nova američka bijela (bourbon barrel) — vanilija, kokos, slatkoća; obvezna za bourbon.
• Ex-bourbon (scotch, rum) — mekši ulaz.
• Sherry butt / PX / oloroso — suho voće, orah, tamnija slatkoća.
• Virgin oak — jači »new wood« pečat.
• Toasting / charring — razina pečenja mijenja karamel i dim.

Chai (skladište)
• Vlažan — više alkohola »odlazi«, mekši stil (angel's share).
• Suh — koncentrira okus, jači ABV gubitak vode.

Solera (Jerez, neki rumovi)
• Criaderas + solera: dinamičko miješanje; prosječna dob raste, etiketa često stilska.

Pri degustaciji
• Sherry cask + maduro / San Andrés — orah, karamela.
• Bourbon cask + Connecticut / Habano — vanilija, citrus most.
• Jako tostirano + peated cigara = pažljivo; lako »preglasa«.
body.en:
Oak gives vanilla, tannin, spice and colour. The warehouse sets the pace.

Cask types (guide)
• Limousin — wider grain, more tannin; cognac classic.
• Tronçais / fine grain — elegance, less aggression.
• New American white (bourbon barrel) — vanilla, coconut, sweetness; required for bourbon.
• Ex-bourbon (Scotch, rum) — softer entry.
• Sherry butt / PX / oloroso — dried fruit, nut, darker sweetness.
• Virgin oak — stronger 'new wood' stamp.
• Toast / char — roast level shifts caramel and smoke.

Chai (warehouse)
• Humid — more alcohol loss, softer style (angel's share).
• Dry — concentrates flavour, stronger water loss.

Solera (Jerez, some rums)
• Criaderas + solera: dynamic blending; average age rises; the label is often stylistic.

When tasting
• Sherry cask + maduro / San Andrés — nut, caramel.
• Bourbon cask + Connecticut / Habano — vanilla, citrus bridge.
• Heavy toast + peated cigar = careful; easy to overpower.

body.hr:
RUM — sirovina i stil
• Melasa (industrial) — većina svijeta; od laganog do heavy.
• Agricole (sok trske) — Martinique/Guadeloupe AOC; biljno, mineralno.
• Pot still / high ester (Jamajka) — funk, voće, ulje.
• Spanish-style / solera — često slađi profil; čitaj šećer.
• Navy / overproof — visoki ABV; razrijedi ili mali gutljaj.
• EU: iznad 20 g/L dodanog šećera → »spirit drink«, ne »rum«.

WHISKY — karte
• Scotch single malt — jedna destilerija, 100 % slad; min. 3 godine u Škotskoj.
• Blended Scotch — malt + grain.
• Single cask / cask strength — jedna bačva / nepreređeno.
• Peat (ppm) — dimljeni ječam; Islay često visoko.
• Bourbon — ≥51 % kukuruz, SAD, nove opaljene bačve.
• Rye — začinski; dobar most s Habano paprom.
• Japanese / Irish — vlastita pravila i stilovi; čitaj etiketu.

Pairing orijentir
• Agricole / lagani rum → Connecticut, panatela.
• Solera / začinjeni rum → Habano, toro.
• Peated → maduro ili dimljeni most; izbjegavaj uz nježni Shade na početku.
• Speyside / bourbon → široki srednji pairing.
body.en:
RUM — base and style
• Molasses (industrial) — most of the world; light to heavy.
• Agricole (cane juice) — Martinique/Guadeloupe AOC; herbal, mineral.
• Pot still / high ester (Jamaica) — funk, fruit, oil.
• Spanish-style / solera — often sweeter; read the sugar.
• Navy / overproof — high ABV; dilute or small sips.
• EU: above 20 g/L added sugar → 'spirit drink', not 'rum'.

WHISKY — maps
• Scotch single malt — one distillery, 100% malt; min. 3 years in Scotland.
• Blended Scotch — malt + grain.
• Single cask / cask strength — one cask / undiluted.
• Peat (ppm) — smoked barley; Islay often high.
• Bourbon — ≥51% corn, USA, new charred barrels.
• Rye — spicy; good bridge with Habano pepper.
• Japanese / Irish — own rules and styles; read the label.

Pairing guide
• Agricole / light rum → Connecticut, panatela.
• Solera / spiced rum → Habano, toro.
• Peated → maduro or a smoke bridge; avoid with delicate Shade early on.
• Speyside / bourbon → wide mid-range pairing.

body.hr:
Uz cigaru biraj tijelo i slatkoću — tanini mladog crvenog često zatežu dim.

SHERRY (Jerez)
• Fino / manzanilla — suhi, slani, badem; Connecticut, lunch, prva trećina.
• Amontillado — orah, srednje tijelo; Habano.
• Oloroso — bogatiji, suhi; maduro most.
• PX (Pedro Ximénez) — gust, suho voće; tamni wrapper, desertni trenutak.
• Cream — slatki blend; lagano uz desert.

PORTO
• White / rose — rjeđe uz cigar; biraj svjesno.
• Ruby / LBV — voće, mlađi tanin; oprez s dimom.
• Tawny 10/20/30/40 — orah, karamela; klasik uz maduro.
• Vintage — moćan; za zrelu večer, ne prvi gutljaj dana.

OSTALO
• Madeira (bual/malmsey) — oksidativna slatkoća; dobar most.
• Amarone / zreli crveni — manje agresivni tanini; srednje cigare.
• Champagne / cava / brut — mjehurići čiste; lagani cigar ili aperitiv.
• Prošek (HR) — passito desertno, ne prosecco.

Pri degustaciji
• Gutljaj → dim → gutljaj. Traži most (orah, karamela, citrus, sol).
• Slatko vino uz gorku zadnju trećinu često spašava balans.
body.en:
With cigars, choose body and sweetness — young red tannins often tighten smoke.

SHERRY (Jerez)
• Fino / manzanilla — dry, saline, almond; Connecticut, lunch, first third.
• Amontillado — nut, medium body; Habano.
• Oloroso — richer, dry; maduro bridge.
• PX (Pedro Ximénez) — dense, dried fruit; dark wrapper, dessert moment.
• Cream — sweet blend; lightly with dessert.

PORT
• White / rose — rarer with cigars; choose deliberately.
• Ruby / LBV — fruit, younger tannin; careful with smoke.
• Tawny 10/20/30/40 — nut, caramel; classic with maduro.
• Vintage — powerful; for a ripe evening, not the first sip of the day.

OTHER
• Madeira (bual/malmsey) — oxidative sweetness; good bridge.
• Amarone / mature reds — softer tannins; medium cigars.
• Champagne / cava / brut — bubbles cleanse; light cigar or aperitif.
• Prošek (HR) — passito dessert wine, not prosecco.

When tasting
• Sip → smoke → sip. Look for a bridge (nut, caramel, citrus, salt).
• Sweet wine with a bitter final third often saves the balance.

body.hr:
Čaše
• Snifter / balon — konjak, armagnac, calvados; zdjela skuplja miris.
• Tulipan / Glencairn — whisky, rum na čisto; nos usmjeren.
• Copita — fino/manzanilla.
• Tumbler / rocks — highball, led, dugi drink.
• Flute / tulipan pjenušavo — aperitiv uz lagani cigar.

Temperature
• Brandy / whisky na sobnoj (18–20 °C); ruka na zdjeli ako želiš toplinu.
• Ne grij nad plamenom — gubi se kontrola i miris.
• Fino hladnije; tawny/PX malo ispod sobne; porto ruby hladniji od tawnyja.

Voda i led
• Kap vode u cask strength otvara arome.
• Led u brandyju razrjeđuje i hladi — biraj svjesno (highball ≠ degustacija XO).
• Čista voda uz stol čisti nepce između dima i gutljaja.

Redoslijed večeri
1. Miris. 2. Gutljaj. 3. Dim. 4. Gutljaj — most.
• Espresso uz talijanski brandy/grappu nakon jela — klasik.
• Ne miješaj pet stilova u jednoj sesiji ako učiš — dva dovoljna.
body.en:
Glasses
• Snifter / balloon — cognac, armagnac, calvados; the bowl holds aroma.
• Tulip / Glencairn — whisky, neat rum; nose focused.
• Copita — fino/manzanilla.
• Tumbler / rocks — highball, ice, long drink.
• Flute / sparkling tulip — aperitif with a light cigar.

Temperature
• Brandy / whisky at room (18–20 °C); hand on the bowl if you want warmth.
• Do not heat over a flame — you lose control and aroma.
• Fino cooler; tawny/PX slightly below room; ruby port cooler than tawny.

Water and ice
• A drop of water in cask strength opens aromas.
• Ice in brandy dilutes and chills — choose deliberately (highball ≠ tasting XO).
• Clean water at the table resets the palate between smoke and sip.

Evening order
1. Nose. 2. Sip. 3. Smoke. 4. Sip — bridge.
• Espresso with Italian brandy/grappa after a meal — a classic.
• Do not mix five styles in one learning session — two are enough.

body.hr:
Aditivi mijenjaju boju, slatkoću i »zaobljenost«. Nisu automatski loši — bitno je znati što piješ.

Što pravila dopuštaju (orijentir)
• EU rum — do 20 g/L dodanog šećera uz naziv »rum«; iznad → spirit drink.
• Scotch — E150a karamel dozvoljen; šećer ne kao rum.
• Konjak — šećer, E150a i boisé do ograničenja obskuracije; često bez obveze na etiketi.
• Armagnac — stroži odnos prema aditivima u praksi mnogih kuća.
• Bourbon — bez dodanog šećera/boje (pravila stila).

Što tražiti
• »No additives« / »brut de fût« / »cask strength, non-chill« — stilski izbori transparentnih kuća.
• Solera rum s visokom slatkoćom — čitaj recenzije / deklaracije kad postoje.
• App polje additiveStatus — bilježi kad znamo; transparentnost, ne kazna.

Pri pairing
• Slatđi rum »lijepi« gorčinu zadnje trećine, ali može sakriti nijanse Connecticut.
• Čisti distillate lakše čitaš uz lagani cigar i vodu.
• Ako učiš nepce, biraj jednu »čistu« i jednu »zaobljenu« bocu — usporedi.
body.en:
Additives change colour, sweetness and 'roundness'. They are not automatically bad — what matters is knowing what you drink.

What rules allow (guide)
• EU rum — up to 20 g/L added sugar under the name 'rum'; above → spirit drink.
• Scotch — E150a caramel allowed; sugar not as in rum.
• Cognac — sugar, E150a and boisé within obscuration limits; often not mandatory on the label.
• Armagnac — stricter additive practice in many houses.
• Bourbon — no added sugar/colour (style rules).

What to look for
• 'No additives' / 'brut de fût' / 'cask strength, non-chill' — stylistic choices of transparent houses.
• Solera rum with high sweetness — read reviews / declarations when available.
• App field additiveStatus — logged when known; transparency, not a penalty.

When pairing
• Sweeter rum 'glues' final-third bitterness but can hide Connecticut nuance.
• Cleaner distillates read more easily with a light cigar and water.
• If training the palate, pick one 'clean' and one 'rounded' bottle — compare.

title.hr: Gin pairing kut: botanika, tonik i dim
title.en: Gin pairing corner: botanicals, tonic and smoke

body.hr:
Gin radi s cigarom kad ga tretiraš kao aromatični most, ne kao neutralni highball. Botanike, gorčina tonika i citrus mogu očistiti nepce, ali lako prerežu nježan dim.

Stilovi
• London Dry — kleka, citrus, suho; uz Connecticut, Cameroon ili kraći Habano kad želiš svježinu.
• Old Tom / barrel-aged — blaža slatkoća, začin, drvo; bolji s robusto Habano ili lakšim maduro.
• Navy strength — visoki ABV; razrijedi, manji gutljaji, voda obavezno.
• Herbal / Mediterranean gin — ružmarin, maslina, kadulja; traži slane mostove, fino sherry ili citrus twist.

Serviranje
• G&T neka bude suši: premium tonik, puno leda, ne previše šećera.
• Ne utapaj u garnish; jedan citrus ili maslina dovoljno.
• Ne počinji s najjačom trećinom cigare i najgorčim tonikom.

Pairing
• Kleka + cedar, citrus + Connecticut, blaga slatkoća + maduro kakao.
• Ako tonik daje metaliku s dimom, prebaci na soda highball ili gin neat u maloj čaši.
body.en:
Gin works with a cigar when you treat it as an aromatic bridge, not as a neutral highball. Botanicals, tonic bitterness and citrus can reset the palate, but they can also cut through delicate smoke.

Styles
• London Dry — juniper, citrus, dry; with Connecticut, Cameroon or a shorter Habano when you want freshness.
• Old Tom / barrel-aged — softer sweetness, spice, wood; better with robusto Habano or a lighter maduro.
• Navy strength — high ABV; dilute it, take smaller sips, keep water mandatory.
• Herbal / Mediterranean gin — rosemary, olive, sage; look for saline bridges, fino sherry or a citrus twist.

Service
• Keep the G&T dry: premium tonic, plenty of ice, not too much sugar.
• Do not drown it in garnish; one citrus peel or olive is enough.
• Do not open with the strongest cigar third and the most bitter tonic.

Pairing
• Juniper + cedar, citrus + Connecticut, gentle sweetness + maduro cocoa.
• If tonic turns metallic with smoke, switch to a soda highball or a small neat pour.

body.hr:
Oblik čaše usmjerava miris i temperaturu — biraj po piću, ne po setu na polici.

Vrste
• Snifter / balon — široka zdjela, uži vrh; konjak, armagnac, calvados.
• Glencairn — whisky standard; tulipan + stabilna baza.
• Copita / sherry — uska; fino i manzanilla.
• ISO / univerzalni tulipan — solidan all-rounder za degustaciju.
• Tumbler / rocks — led, highball, neformalno.
• Highball / collins — dugi drink s sodom.
• Flute / pjenušavo tulipan — champagne, cava.
• Porto / dessert — manji volumen za slatka vina.

Pri korištenju
• Operi bez mirisa deterdženta; isperi vrućom vodom.
• Ne puni snifter do vrha — 2–3 cl za nos.
• Jedna dobra čaša > pet dekorativnih.
• Za večer s gostima: snifter + Glencairn + voda pokrivaju 90 %.
body.en:
Glass shape steers aroma and temperature — choose by drink, not by the shelf set.

Types
• Snifter / balloon — wide bowl, narrower rim; cognac, armagnac, calvados.
• Glencairn — whisky standard; tulip + stable base.
• Copita / sherry — narrow; fino and manzanilla.
• ISO / universal tulip — solid all-rounder for tasting.
• Tumbler / rocks — ice, highball, informal.
• Highball / collins — long drink with soda.
• Flute / sparkling tulip — champagne, cava.
• Port / dessert — smaller volume for sweet wines.

In use
• Wash without scented detergent; rinse hot.
• Do not fill a snifter to the brim — 2–3 cl for the nose.
• One good glass > five decorative ones.
• For guests: snifter + Glencairn + water cover 90%.

body.hr:
Cilj: stabilnih 65–72 % RH i ~18–21 °C. Veličinu biraj s rezervom — cigare trebaju zrak.

Vrste
• Desktop (25–100) — početak; cedar unutra, dobar pečat.
• Putni / cedar pouch / jar (5–15) — večer vani; Boveda unutra.
• Kabinet / ormar (200+) — kad zaliha raste; police, higrometar, više paketa vlage.
• Akrilni / tupperdor — jeftin kontrolirani volumen uz Boveda.
• Klima ormar (aktivni) — elektronika; za veće kolekcije.

Što mora biti unutra
• Španjolski cedar ili cedar ploče.
• Digihigrometar (kalibriran).
• Izvor vlage: Boveda 58/62/65/69/72 (ili kontrolirani humidifier).

Pri kupnji / korištenju
• Seasoning prije prvih cigara (dani, ne sati).
• Dalje od sunca, radijatora, prozorske daske.
• Ne otvaraj svaki sat — RH skače.
• Mirisne i nježne cigare odvoji pregradom.
body.en:
Goal: stable 65–72% RH and ~18–21 °C. Size up with headroom — cigars need air.

Types
• Desktop (25–100) — starting point; cedar inside, good seal.
• Travel / cedar pouch / jar (5–15) — evenings out; Boveda inside.
• Cabinet / wardrobe (200+) — when stock grows; shelves, hygrometer, more packs.
• Acrylic / tupperdor — cheap controlled volume with Boveda.
• Climate cabinet (active) — electronics; for larger collections.

What must be inside
• Spanish cedar or cedar trays.
• Digital hygrometer (calibrated).
• Humidity source: Boveda 58/62/65/69/72 (or a controlled humidifier).

Buying / use
• Season before the first cigars (days, not hours).
• Away from sun, radiators, window sills.
• Do not open every hour — RH jumps.
• Separate aromatic and delicate sticks with a divider.

body.hr:
Oštar alat = čist otvor kape. Tup alat kidati će omotač.

Vrste
• Double guillotine — dvije oštrice; default za parejo.
• Single guillotine — jedna oštrica; jeftinija, traži oštrinu.
• V-cut — klin; belicoso, torpedo, veći RG.
• Punch / bullet — 7–9 mm tipično; uži kanal, manje otpada.
• Cigar scissors — veliki figurado; sporija kontrola.
• Table cutter / mount — desk ritual.

Karakteristike pri rezanju
• Parejo: samo kapa, ne ram.
• Figurado: manje je više.
• Premali otvor → gušenje; prevelik → vruć draw.

Održavanje
• Obriši ulje duhana; povremeno nabruši ili zamijeni oštrice.
• Nosilac / futrola — ne dno torbe s ključevima.
• Jedan solidan double + jedan punch pokrivaju većinu večeri.
body.en:
A sharp tool = a clean cap opening. A dull tool will tear the wrapper.

Types
• Double guillotine — two blades; default for parejos.
• Single guillotine — one blade; cheaper, needs sharpness.
• V-cut — wedge; belicoso, torpedo, larger RG.
• Punch / bullet — 7–9 mm typical; tighter channel, less waste.
• Cigar scissors — large figurados; slower control.
• Table cutter / mount — desk ritual.

Cutting traits
• Parejo: cap only, not the shoulder.
• Figurado: less is more.
• Too small → choke; too large → hot draw.

Care
• Wipe tobacco oils; sharpen or replace blades now and then.
• Sleeve / case — not the bottom of a bag with keys.
• One solid double + one punch cover most evenings.

body.hr:
Cigarska pepeljara drži cigar stabilno i hvata pepeo — kava šalica nije zamjena.

Vrste
• Classic rest (1–4 utora) — keramika, staklo, metal, drvo s metalnim rubom.
• Deep well — veći pepeo Churchill/double corona.
• Twin / sharing — dva utora za goste.
• Travel tin / pocket ash — pepeo vani dok ne nađeš kantu.
• Stand / spike — rjeđe; cigar na stalku.

Karakteristike
• Utor dovoljno dubok da cigara ne kotrlja.
• Materijal bez jakog mirisa (izbjegavaj jeftinu plastiku koja »znoji« miris).
• Lako pranje — pepeo i ulja se lijepe.

Pri pušenju
• Ne treperi; podrži kad pepeo sam padne.
• Vjetar vani — zakloni pepeljaru ili sjedi leđima vjetru.
• Jedna velika stolna + putna limenka = dom i terasa.
body.en:
A cigar ashtray holds the stick steady and catches ash — a coffee cup is not a substitute.

Types
• Classic rest (1–4 notches) — ceramic, glass, metal, wood with a metal rim.
• Deep well — more ash for Churchill/double corona.
• Twin / sharing — two rests for guests.
• Travel tin / pocket ash — ash outdoors until you find a bin.
• Stand / spike — rarer; cigar on a peg.

Traits
• Notch deep enough that the cigar does not roll.
• Material without strong smell (avoid cheap plastic that 'sweats' odour).
• Easy to wash — ash and oils stick.

While smoking
• Do not tap; support when ash falls on its own.
• Wind outside — shelter the tray or sit with your back to the wind.
• One large table tray + a travel tin = home and terrace.

body.hr:
Dekantera olakšava posluživanje i izgled police — ne poboljšava brandy kao vino.

Vrste
• Crystal / stakleni balon s čepom — klasik za whisky/brandy.
• Square / ship's — stabilniji oblik.
• Small tasting decanter — 20–50 cl za večer.
• Boca s dobrim čepom — često dovoljna bez dekantera.

Kad ima smisla
• Gosti i ritual posluživanja.
• Polovica boce koju trošiš u tjednima/mjesecima.
• Estetika police uz čaše.

Oprez
• Svjetlost i toplina kvare destilat — ormar ili hladnija polica.
• Označi sadržaj (etiketa/tag) — XO i VSOP izgledaju slično.
• Kristal s olovom: ne ostavljaj jako kisela pića godinama; za spirits u razumnom roku OK u praksi mnogih kuća — troši, ne arhiviraj desetljećima u dekanteru.
• Za dugo čuvanje: originalna boca, manje zraka (prelij u manju ako treba).
body.en:
A decanter eases serving and shelf looks — it does not 'improve' brandy the way it can wine.

Types
• Crystal / glass balloon with stopper — classic for whisky/brandy.
• Square / ship's — more stable shape.
• Small tasting decanter — 20–50 cl for an evening.
• Bottle with a good cork — often enough without a decanter.

When it makes sense
• Guests and serving ritual.
• A half bottle you will finish in weeks/months.
• Shelf aesthetics next to glasses.

Cautions
• Light and heat spoil spirit — cupboard or cooler shelf.
• Label the contents (tag) — XO and VSOP look alike.
• Lead crystal: do not park highly acidic drinks for years; for spirits finished in a reasonable time, common practice is fine — drink, do not archive for decades in a decanter.
• For long storage: original bottle, less air (downsize if needed).

body.hr:
Plamen bez mirisa. Benzin/Zippo fluid ostavlja trag u prvim dimovima.

Vrste
• Soft flame butan — nježniji na omotač; desk lighting.
• Single jet / torch — fokusiran; dobar na blagom vjetru.
• Triple / quad torch — brži toast velikih footova; drži dalje.
• Soft + jet combo — dva moda u jednom.
• Šibice dugog gorenja — kontrola, bez plastike.
• Cedar spill / strip — odreži tanku traku cedra; mirisan ritual, čist plamen.

Pri paljenju
• Toast bez dodira lista; vrti foot.
• Torch daleko da ne ugljeniše.
• Soft flame bliže, strpljivije.

Održavanje
• Čisti butan (ne »jeftini mirisni«).
• Ispuni rezervoar prije nego ostane na suho.
• Rezervni upaljač u putnom kitu — jedan umire kad zatreba.
body.en:
Odourless flame. Petrol/Zippo fluid taints the first puffs.

Types
• Soft-flame butane — kinder to the wrapper; desk lighting.
• Single jet / torch — focused; good in light wind.
• Triple / quad torch — faster toast on large foots; keep distance.
• Soft + jet combo — two modes in one.
• Long matches — control, no plastic.
• Cedar spill / strip — a thin cedar strip; fragrant ritual, clean flame.

When lighting
• Toast without touching the leaf; rotate the foot.
• Torch farther away so you do not charcoal.
• Soft flame closer, more patiently.

Care
• Clean butane (not 'cheap scented').
• Refill before it runs dry.
• Spare lighter in the travel kit — one dies when you need it.

body.hr:
Počni s pet stvari koje koristiš svaki put — ostatak dodaješ kad osjetiš rupu.

Minimalni kit
1. Digihigrometar + mali humidor / putna kutija + Boveda.
2. Double guillotine (oštar).
3. Soft flame butan (ili soft+jet).
4. Pepeljara s utorom.
5. Jedna Glencairn ili snifter + čista voda.

Drugi krug (kad znaš što ti fali)
• Punch i/ili V-cut.
• Putni humidor.
• Veća pepeljara / druga čaša (snifter + Glencairn).
• Cedar spills.

Treći krug
• Kabinet, dekantera, stolni rezač, klima — kad zaliha i ritual to traže.

Budžet logika
• Bolje jedan dobar rezač nego tri tupа.
• App Shopping pokazuje praznine u kolekciji — popis, ne imperativ.
• Gostima: blaga + srednja cigara, VSOP/tawny, rezač i pepeljara na stolu.
body.en:
Start with five things you use every time — add the rest when you feel the gap.

Starter kit
1. Digital hygrometer + small humidor / travel box + Boveda.
2. Double guillotine (sharp).
3. Soft-flame butane (or soft+jet).
4. Notched ashtray.
5. One Glencairn or snifter + clean water.

Second round (when you know the gap)
• Punch and/or V-cut.
• Travel humidor.
• Larger ashtray / second glass (snifter + Glencairn).
• Cedar spills.

Third round
• Cabinet, decanter, table cutter, climate unit — when stock and ritual ask for them.

Budget logic
• One good cutter beats three dull ones.
• App Shopping shows collection gaps — a list, not an order.
• For guests: mild + medium cigar, VSOP/tawny, cutter and ashtray on the table.

body.hr:
Cilj: hladan dim, svijetli pepeo, ujednačena linija.

Praktično
• 30–60 s između povlačenja; kratki gutljaji dima.
• Crn, vruć pepeo → stani 1–2 min; cigara se oporavi.
• Canoeing → sporija strana gore / dogrij; uspori ritam.
• Prva trećina = upoznavanje; ne žuri u »dokazivanje« snage.

Uz piće
• Miris → gutljaj → dim → gutljaj.
• Ako peče jezik, uspori prije nego dodaš jači gutljaj alkohola.
body.en:
Goal: cool smoke, pale ash, even line.

Practice
• 30–60 s between draws; short puffs.
• Black, hot ash → pause 1–2 min; the cigar recovers.
• Canoeing → slow side up / touch up; slow the pace.
• First third = introduction; do not rush to 'prove' strength.

With the drink
• Nose → sip → smoke → sip.
• If the tongue burns, slow down before adding a stronger sip of alcohol.

body.hr:
Čista voda je alat, ne napitak »umjesto« pairinga.

Što radi
• Resetira nepce između dima i gutljaja.
• Kap u cask strength whiskyju otvara arome.
• Hladi ritam — gutljaj vode = pauza u vučenju.

Što paziti
• Jako gazirano i slatka kava mogu umrtviti fine note Connecticut.
• Espresso nakon jela uz brandy — klasik; tijekom nježnog cigara može dominirati.
• Bez mirisa u čaši (detergent, pasta za zube prije degustacije).

Za stolom
• Voda uvijek; pairing piće po planu; kava svjesno kao treći akt.
body.en:
Clean water is a tool, not a drink 'instead of' pairing.

What it does
• Resets the palate between smoke and sip.
• A drop in cask-strength whisky opens aromas.
• Cools the pace — a sip of water = a pause in drawing.

Watch for
• Heavy fizz and sweet coffee can numb Connecticut nuance.
• Espresso after a meal with brandy — classic; during a delicate cigar it can dominate.
• No scent in the glass (detergent, toothpaste before tasting).

At the table
• Water always; pairing drink by plan; coffee deliberately as a third act.

body.hr:
Kava je most kad gorčina, prženje i tekstura prate tijelo cigare. Nije automatski dobar pairing: preslatka kava ili predugo ekstrahiran espresso mogu pokriti sve fine note.

Espresso
• Blagi Connecticut / Cameroon — kraći espresso, svjetlije prženje, malo vode uz šalicu.
• Habano / srednje tijelo — klasični espresso ili doppio; traži orah, cedar, kakao.
• Maduro / oscuro — ristretto ili tamniji espresso nakon jela; dobro s čokoladom, loše ako je spaljeno gorak.
• Cappuccino / mlijeko — omekšava papar i nikotin, ali skriva mineralnost i fine cvjetne note.

Ritam
• Prvo pomiriši kavu, pa dim, pa mali gutljaj; ne zalijevaj svako povlačenje.
• Ako jezik peče, problem je često tempo cigare ili preekstrahirana kava.
• Voda ostaje na stolu jer kava ne resetira nepce kao voda.

Mostovi
• Crema + cedar, kakao + maduro, lješnjak + Connecticut, citrusna arabica + Habano.
body.en:
Coffee is a bridge when bitterness, roast and texture follow the cigar's body. It is not automatically a good pairing: sweet coffee or over-extracted espresso can cover every fine note.

Espresso
• Mild Connecticut / Cameroon — shorter espresso, lighter roast, a little water beside the cup.
• Habano / medium body — classic espresso or doppio; look for nut, cedar, cocoa.
• Maduro / oscuro — ristretto or darker espresso after food; good with chocolate, bad when burnt-bitter.
• Cappuccino / milk — softens pepper and nicotine, but hides minerality and fine floral notes.

Pace
• Nose the coffee first, then smoke, then take a small sip; do not chase every draw.
• If the tongue burns, the issue is often cigar pace or over-extracted coffee.
• Keep water on the table because coffee does not reset the palate like water.

Bridges
• Crema + cedar, cocoa + maduro, hazelnut + Connecticut, citrusy arabica + Habano.

body.hr:
Teški obrok + jaka maduro + XO može biti previše odjednom.

Orijentir
• Nakon ručka: Connecticut / petit + VSOP / fino.
• Sat nakon večere: srednja–puna cigara + XO / tawny.
• Desert: maduro + PX / tawny / čokolada / orasi.
• Sir s jakim taninom može zategnuti dim — biraj zreliji, kremastiji.

Redoslijed
1. Jelo. 2. Kratka pauza. 3. Piće na nos. 4. Cigar. 5. Pairing petlja.

Aperitiv
• Pjenušavo + lagani cigar prije jela — otvara večer, ne zatvara je.
body.en:
Heavy meal + strong maduro + XO can be too much at once.

Guide
• After lunch: Connecticut / petit + VSOP / fino.
• An hour after dinner: medium–full cigar + XO / tawny.
• Dessert: maduro + PX / tawny / chocolate / nuts.
• Strong-tannin cheese can tighten smoke — choose riper, creamier.

Order
1. Food. 2. Short pause. 3. Drink on the nose. 4. Cigar. 5. Pairing loop.

Aperitif
• Sparkling + light cigar before the meal — opens the evening, does not close it.

body.hr:
Transport i trgovina mijenjaju RH i doživljaj — daj vremena.

Cigare
• Nekoliko dana do 2 tjedna u humidoru prije suda.
• »Tight« prvog dana često popusti nakon odmora.
• Nakon putovanja: vrati u kutiju, ne pali iz džepa odmah.

Piće
• Otvorena boca: troši u mjesecima (whisky/brandy sporije propada od vina, ali zrak radi).
• Prelij u manju bocu ako ostane malo.
• Novo otvoreno XO: prvih dana miris se »slegne« — ne sudi u 30 s.

Kolekcija
• Bilježi datum odmora / otvaranja — vidiš obrazac što ti treba mir.
body.en:
Travel and shop conditions change RH and impression — give time.

Cigars
• A few days to 2 weeks in the humidor before judging.
• First-day 'tight' often eases after rest.
• After travel: back in the box; do not light from the pocket immediately.

Drink
• Open bottle: finish in months (whisky/brandy fades slower than wine, but air works).
• Downsize the bottle if little remains.
• Freshly opened XO: aroma settles over days — do not judge in 30 s.

Collection
• Log rest / open dates — you will see what needs calm.

body.hr:
Sjećanje laže nakon treće večeri — piši kratko, ali uvijek istim redom. Dobra bilješka nije poezija nego kontrola varijabli.

Predložak bilješke
• Setup — datum, mjesto, vrijeme, RH ako znaš, jelo prije i koliko si odmoran.
• Cigara — naziv, vitola, wrapper, rez, draw, prva / srednja / zadnja trećina.
• Piće — kategorija, stil, dob ili cask, temperatura, voda/led, omjer ako je highball.
• Most — 2–3 riječi koje su se spojile: kakao, orah, citrus, sol, cedar, kava.
• Presuda — snaga 1–5, balans 1–5, bi li ponovio isto ili promijenio samo jednu stvar.

Kako pisati
• Zapiši prvu impresiju u 2 minute, zatim dopuni nakon sredine cigare.
• Odvoji »okus cigare« od »pairing efekta«; piće može spasiti ili pokvariti istu cigaru.
• Ne mijenjaj pet varijabli odjednom: ista cigara + drugo piće ili isto piće + druga vitola.

Nakon ~20 unosa
• Vidiš obrazac: Connecticut + fino, maduro + Jerez, Habano + espresso.
• App pairing je orijentir; dnevnik je tvoja istina.
body.en:
Memory lies after the third evening — write briefly, but always in the same order. A good note is not poetry; it is variable control.

Tasting-note template
• Setup — date, place, weather, RH if known, food beforehand and how rested you are.
• Cigar — name, vitola, wrapper, cut, draw, first / middle / final third.
• Drink — category, style, age or cask, temperature, water/ice, ratio if it is a highball.
• Bridge — 2–3 words that connected: cocoa, nut, citrus, salt, cedar, coffee.
• Verdict — strength 1–5, balance 1–5, would you repeat it or change just one thing.

How to journal
• Write the first impression within 2 minutes, then add notes after the cigar's middle.
• Separate 'cigar flavour' from 'pairing effect'; the drink can save or spoil the same cigar.
• Do not change five variables at once: same cigar + another drink, or same drink + another vitola.

After ~20 entries
• Patterns appear: Connecticut + fino, maduro + Jerez, Habano + espresso.
• App pairing is a guide; the journal is your truth.

body.hr:
Vani ritam i RH mijenjaju cigaru brže nego u sobi.

Vjetar
• Ubrzava gorenje i canoeing — leđa vjetru, zaklon, pažljiv jet.
• Panatela/lancero pate prvi.

Vlaga
• Visoka vanjska RH → mekši draw, teže održati žar.
• Suhi zimski zrak → kraj se suši; kraće sesije ili putni humidor.

Hladnoća
• Ruke i čaša hladniji; brandy manje »otvara« — malo vremena u ruci.
• Ne kompenziraj bržim vučenjem.

Kit vani
• Putni humidor, jet+soft, pepeljara/limenka, vjetrobran stol.
body.en:
Outdoors, pace and RH change the cigar faster than indoors.

Wind
• Speeds burn and canoeing — back to the wind, shelter, careful jet.
• Panatela/lancero suffer first.

Humidity
• High outdoor RH → softer draw, harder to keep the coal.
• Dry winter air → the end dries; shorter sessions or a travel humidor.

Cold
• Hands and glass cooler; brandy opens less — a moment in the hand.
• Do not compensate with faster draws.

Kit outside
• Travel humidor, jet+soft, ashtray/tin, windbreak table.

body.hr:
Pairing je iskustvo, ne inventar.

Prioriteti
1. Oštar rezač + čista čaša + stabilna RH.
2. Tri dobre večeri mjesečno > petnaest prosječnih.
3. Jedna boca VSOP koju razumiješ > pet otvorenih »za svaki slučaj«.

Što odgoditi
• Kabinet prije nego desktop pun.
• Dekantera prije nego imaš čašu koju voliš.
• Deseti upaljač prije rezervnog plina za jedan dobar.

App
• Shopping = popis praznina, ne shopping lista pod pritiskom.
• Club 101 lekcije čitaj uz stvarni gutljaj — jeftiniji trening od kupovine »još jedne boce da naučiš«.
body.en:
Pairing is an experience, not an inventory.

Priorities
1. Sharp cutter + clean glass + stable RH.
2. Three good evenings a month > fifteen average ones.
3. One VSOP you understand > five open 'just in case' bottles.

What to defer
• Cabinet before the desktop is full.
• Decanter before you have a glass you like.
• Tenth lighter before spare fuel for one good one.

App
• Shopping = gap list, not a pressure shopping list.
• Read Club 101 with a real sip — cheaper training than buying 'one more bottle to learn'.

body.hr:
Dobar domaćin nudi ljestvicu, ne test.

Na stolu
• Blaga cigara (Connecticut / petit) + srednja (robusto Habano).
• Jedno pristupačno piće: VSOP, tawny, ili ne-peated whisky.
• Rezač, pepeljara, voda — gost ne improvizira s kuhinjskim nožem.

Pitaj
• Vole li dimljeno / jako?
• Koliko imaju vremena (30 vs 90 min)?
• Preferiraju li slatko ili suho?

Izbjegavaj na startu
• Peated bomba + nježni gost.
• Najjača maduro »da vide što imaš«.
• Pet otvorenih boca odjednom — dvije i voda dovoljne.

Zatvaranje
• Ponudi skraćivanje zadnje trećine bez srama — gost nije obavezan doći do band-a.
body.en:
A good host offers a ladder, not a test.

On the table
• Mild cigar (Connecticut / petit) + medium (Habano robusto).
• One approachable drink: VSOP, tawny, or unpeated whisky.
• Cutter, ashtray, water — guests do not improvise with a kitchen knife.

Ask
• Do they like smoke / strength?
• How much time (30 vs 90 min)?
• Sweet or dry preference?

Avoid at the start
• Peated bomb + delicate guest.
• Strongest maduro 'so they see what you have'.
• Five open bottles at once — two plus water are enough.

Closing
• Offer shortening the final third without shame — guests need not reach the band.
